danexchat: DanexChat is an on-device assistant app based on SmolLM and created by DanexCodr (Danison Nuñez).
smollm: SmolLM is a compact language model family designed for efficient local inference.
onnx: ONNX is an open model exchange format used here to run inference with ONNX Runtime on Android.
quantization: 4-bit quantization reduces model size and memory usage while keeping useful generation quality.
routing: Routing classifies requests such as factual, creative, or general so generation settings can be adjusted.
date: Use the $date tag for current local date and $time for current local time in prompts.
